title: diphyes myrtillus
intro: Diphyes myrtillus, also known as the bilberry, is a type of shrub that belongs to the heath family and is closely related to the blueberry and cranberry. The bilberry has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include being rich in antioxidants, vitamins, and minerals. It has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and protecting against age-related macular degeneration. Bilberry is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and capsules, and is also used as a flavoring agent in jams, preserves, and other foods.
